title: NormalizedIntake
description: Canonical payload emitted by every ingestion adapter (Phase 6) and consumed by the intake agent (Phase 4.5). Adapters normalize channel-specific inputs (web form, email, Mercurio CSV, WhatsApp, phone) into this single shape so the intake agent has one input contract.

citizen_name.description: Full name. Null when is_anonymous=true or channel did not capture it.

is_anonymous.description: True when the citizen did not identify themselves. Triggers the anonimato gate in validity.

document_id.description: Cédula or other ID. Null when anonymous or not provided.

subject.description: Short subject line. May be channel-generated (email Subject:) or citizen-provided (web form).

description.description: Cleaned/normalized body text. May equal raw_text on channels where no normalization is needed.

raw_text.description: Byte-for-byte original body as received. Never mutated. Feeds the format-preserve contract.

location_text.description: Free-form location as stated by the citizen (pre-geocoding).

consent_data.description: Habeas Data (Ley 1581/2012) consent flag. Adapters MUST capture this explicitly.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the adapter received the PQR. Storage normalizes to UTC; deadline math normalizes to America/Bogota.
